evidence: "This is a great comedy. I recommend it to everyone who likes a spoof."
"Excellent adaptation of the book, though the happy ending created suspicion - not very John le Carre."
"Great Sherlock tale. Good to see a different actor in the role. Excellent story, very complex, but totally worth it."
"I went back to the novel and compared the written with the filmed and was satisfied that the film had done no great damage."
"I look forward to reading the book. Great cast, great mood."
"Great characters, great story. The best of black and white."
"Fascinating premise. I look forward to reading the book. Great cast, great mood."
"I'm a big Stanley Tucci fan and he really outdid himself on this film."
"Great music. This musical is a wonderful use of the music of Alexander Borodin."
"The cast of characters, the plot twists, the culture, it is just captivating."
"I look forward to refreshing my memory of it in the near future."
"It is a delightful bit of nonsense. Pure recreation. Fills the need."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedies and historical dramas, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They enjoy engaging characters and captivating stories, indicating a taste for emotionally resonant content.
